positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial botanical arrangement. Dominant features include bioluminescent geometric mandalas formed by overgrown constellations and intricate flowering vines. The composition features a central, symmetrical nexus point, surrounded by repeating patterns of deep navy blue, ethereal violet, and glowing gold line-art elements. The style is a perfect fusion of Art Deco geometry and neo-tribal naturalism, rendered with sharp, thick silhouettes and negative space for maximum print impact. The elements must appear as clean, vectorized line work with solid, high-contrast color fills, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Focus on strong contrast, crisp edges, and a regal, mystic aesthetic. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, graphic design quality, poster art, flat lay composition.
negative: blurry, sketch, photo, realism, messy, grunge, gradient, low contrast, watermark, signature, text, dirty, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, bokeh, out of focus, amateur drawing, logo
